title: lycopodium complanatum subsp. montellii
intro: Lycopodium complanatum subsp. montellii, also known as the club moss or wolf's claw, is a type of lycopod plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a perennial evergreen plant native to Europe and Asia, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains beta-pinene, a compound with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and promote overall health and well-being. Lycopodium complanatum subsp. montellii can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal benefits and health advantages.
